# Take No Notice

> [!note] 📖 Event · Cost: **3** · Lore

---

Lower the cost play Take No Notice by 1 for each **_Hobbit_** or **_Ranger_** hero you control.
**Action:** Add 5 to each enemy's engagement cost until the end of the round.
